raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kad wiꞥſch uhs Ben-
jamina Wahrtim nahze/ tad bt-
ja tur to Sargu Wirfneeks/
Jerijus Wahrdn/ tas Dehls Se-
lemijus/ ta Dehta Kananijus/
tas grabbe to Praweetu Jeremi-
ju/ un fazzija: Tu gribbi teem
Kaldeëreem peekrift.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Jeremijus fazzija:
Tas ne irr teefa/ es ne eefchu pee
teem Kaldeërceem. Bet tas wiꞥ-
nu ne klausija/ un Jerijus ta-
grabbe Jeremiju/un wedde to pee
teem Leel-Kungeem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee Leel-Kungi apſcai-
tahs pahr Jeremiju / un titte
wiꞥſch/ un likke winnu Zeetu-
ma Namunâ/ eekſch Jonatana ta
Rakſtitaja Namma/ jo to btja
tee par Zeetuma Namunu darrij-
scht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta gabje Jeremijus us
to Namunu eekſch tahs Bedres/
un eekſch teem Kambareem / un
tur fehdeja Jeremijus dauds
Deenas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fuhtija tas Kehniſsch
Zedekijus/ un likke winnu atwest/
un tas Kehniſsch waizaja wiꞥ-
nu tawâ Namunâ pasleppent /
un fazzija: Irrag tahds Wahrdâ
no ta KUNGA? Un Jeremijus
fazzija: Irr. Un wiꞥſch fazzija:
Tu tapſi tam Kehniſſam no Ba-
veles Rohka dohts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Jeremijus fazzija us
to Kehniſſu Zedekiju : Ko efmu es
grehkojs prett tewi/ jeb prett ta-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kur nu irr juhsu Praw-
schi? kas juhs irr fluddinaijsc
un fazzijſchi: Tas Kehniſſch
Babeles prett juhs ne nahk
nedâ prett fcho Semmi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Nu tad/ klauti jelle/
Kungs Kehniſſch! laid jelle ma
na Luhgſchana preekſch terw
Weetu dabbu/ un ne wedd ma
ni atpakkat Jonatana ta Re-
stitaja Namunâ/ ka es tur ne
mirſtu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad patwehleja tas Ke-
niſſch Zedekijus/ ka Jeremiju
Zeetuma Pagalmâ turreht/
winnam tappe ikdeenas wee
Maisês Reezenis dohts no
Zeppaju Eelaſ/ teekams wi
Maise eekſch ta Pilſtahta bij a
ehsta. Ta palikke Jeremii
eekſch ta Zeetuma Pagalmja.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
